headlines.headline: Crevex Labs reports 5% decline in operating income

sentiment.reasoning: A decline in operating income indicates weaker financial performance, negatively impacting investor sentiment.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
